basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Research Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in Social Science (or related subjects) with minimum 55% marks, NET/M.Phil/Ph.D. preferred, Minimum 2 years research experience (for Research Associate)
qualification.details: Research Associate: Post Graduation in Social Science (or related subjects) with minimum 55% marks. NET/M.Phil/Ph.D. preferred. Minimum 2 years research experience as Research Assistant in any research project. Proficiency in Report Writing, Data Analysis and Academic Communication. Preference for candidates with working knowledge of MS Office, SPSS, AutoCAD and GIS. Research Assistant: Post Graduation in Social Science (or related subjects) with minimum 55% marks. NET/M.Phil/Ph.D. preferred. Understanding of qualitative and quantitative research methods. Practical knowledge of MS Office, SPSS, AutoCAD and GIS software considered additional qualification.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹47,000/- per month (consolidated) for Research Associate, ₹37,000/- per month (consolidated) for Research Assistant

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download MANIT Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate and Research Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by MANIT Bhopal for the recruitment drive. One vacancy is for the Research Associate position and another for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for both posts is Post Graduation in Social Science (or related subjects) with a minimum of 55% marks. NET/M.Phil/Ph.D. is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate position will receive a consolidated salary of ₹47,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of ₹37,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Application Screening, Shortlisting of candidates, and an Interview which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any specific research experience required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 years of research experience as a Research Assistant in any research project is required for the Research Associate position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
